data.current_role_summary: Backend and AI Engineer specialized in high-concurrency systems, generative AI pipelines, and full-stack product development.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Dedicated to building scalable, high-performance backend infrastructures and intelligent agent-driven workflows.
Domain Mastery: Deep technical proficiency in FastAPI, Node.js, LangGraph, and PostgreSQL, with advanced expertise in RAG architectures.
Quantifiable Impact: Proven track record of reducing LLM API costs by 40% and improving persona generation latency by 60% through optimized orchestration.
Strategic Scope: Experienced in designing end-to-end intelligence systems, managing cross-agent workflows, and deploying on GCP with horizontal scaling.
Leadership Philosophy: Hands-on technical founder approach, prioritizing performance benchmarks (k6 load testing) and high-quality software architecture.
Current Momentum: Actively working at RefractOne while maintaining independent ventures like Convoxa, seeking international expansion into the German market.

career_timeline.title: Founder
career_timeline.one_line_impact: Achieved 400+ downloads with a platform handling 1.9M requests at 65ms P95 latency.
